reports.subtitle: A citable ESG & SDG data profile for one territory — every indicator we've gathered, explained in plain language and downloadable as a PDF. Built for compliance buyers, suppliers and investors, not just internal dashboards.
reports.noIndicatorsAvailable: No indicators are available for this selection.

about.heroLede: Borneo Tracker brings environmental, social and sustainability indicators together in one clear and accessible platform.
about.purposeBody: We support public awareness, regional monitoring and evidence-informed decisions by making Borneo's sustainability data easier to explore, compare and understand.
about.resilienceExplainerPart1: here simply means how well a place can look after its own people across life's essentials — from food and energy to housing, healthcare, education and everyday wellbeing — even when times get hard. A territory can look wealthy on paper yet still be fragile if just one of these essentials is weak. Borneo Tracker turns the data into a single 0–100
about.resilienceExplainerPart2: that measures exactly this, rather than judging a place by income alone.
about.resilienceStatusBody: A single 0–100 score with a traffic-light status — green (resilient), amber (at risk) or red (critical) — so a territory's overall standing reads at a glance.
about.resilienceByPillarBody: The score broken into its six essentials — Food, Energy, Education, Shelter, Healthcare and Entertainment — shown as a hexagon and a weakest-first list, so you can see which one is holding a territory back.
about.transparentDataBody: Every indicator includes its source and update information so users can understand where the data comes from and how it supports the dashboard.
about.noticeBody: Borneo Tracker supports awareness and monitoring. For emergencies, always contact the relevant official emergency services.
about.monitorEnvironmentBody: Forest cover, deforestation, air quality, water quality and fire hotspots.
about.monitorSocialBody: Poverty, employment, education, healthcare and clean water access.
about.monitorSustainabilityBody: Regional performance across priority Sustainable Development Goals.
about.exploreEsgBody: Review environmental, social and governance performance.
about.exploreSdgBody: Follow progress toward priority Sustainable Development Goals.
about.exploreNewsBody: Read AI-curated sustainability news with credited sources.
about.exploreCommunityBody: Discuss wildlife, culture, livelihoods and everyday life with people across Borneo.
about.scopeEsgSdgBody: Environmental, social, governance and SDG data
about.scopeSourcesBody: Clear data sources and regular updates
